message:
fix(core,pager): add marker_id tamper detection and pager cleanups

Extend commit-marker verification to reject records with forged
marker_id (BLAKE3-based) even when xxh3 is consistent, add MarkerIdMismatch
error variant, suppress clippy::too_many_arguments on balance_quick with
an #[expect] annotation, and update beads issues, docs, and dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
